A start hook consuming migrations without the app providing *sql.DB
and migrations.Dialect gets the standard unresolved-dependency
diagnostics at the hook, with recipes for both.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations => MIGRATIONSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- shared/hooks.go --
package shared

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations"
)

//fabrik:hook start
func MigrateDB(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, d migrations.Dialect, src migrations.Sources) error {
	return src.Migrate(ctx, db, d)
}
-- shared/migrations.go --
package shared

import "embed"

//fabrik:migrations
//go:embed all:migrations
var Migrations embed.FS
-- shared/migrations/0001_users.sql --
CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
-- want/diags --
error: shared/hooks.go:11:37: no provider or binding supplies this start hook parameter
  help: declare a //fabrik:provider for it
error: shared/hooks.go:11:49: no provider or binding supplies this start hook parameter
  help: provide it next to your database: //fabrik:provider
func NewDialect(cfg *DBConfig) migrations.Dialect { return migrations.DialectSQLite }
